runTitle: v8.11.161 Production Playwright MCP - Dashboard Cards, Profile State, System Controls
coveredSurfaces: Landing and profile system start/stop controls
skippedSurfaces: AI chat conversational QA was not part of this post-deploy UI check
OAuth provider end-to-end login was skipped; guest PIN login was used

expertAssessments.rationale: GitLab tag pipeline 2530237045 succeeded and both Vercel and Cloud Run report v8.11.161, but the UI system state can diverge from /api/system state.
expertAssessments.nextAction: Unify system start/stop state source or explicitly define the UI-only simulation boundary.

expertAssessments.rationale: The requested Playwright MCP path covered login, profile dropdown, system controls, server card layout, and card click navigation.

usageChecks.summary: Current billing period checked after production QA; no billed usage observed, effective usage about 10.0954 USD, billed 0.0000 USD.

artifacts.label: Dashboard server cards after v8.11.161 deploy

completedImprovements.title: Server cards open detail from card body and hide visible expand/detail affordance
completedImprovements.evidence: Production /dashboard showed fixed-width server cards, no visible '상세 정보 펼치기/접기' text, and clicking db-mysql-dc1-primary card opened /dashboard/servers/db-mysql-dc1-primary.

completedImprovements.title: Top-right profile dropdown reflects guest authenticated state
completedImprovements.evidence: After guest PIN login, profile button label changed to 'GU 게스트 사용자 게스트 로그인' and menu exposed session 종료 controls.

pendingImprovements.title: System start UI proceeds to dashboard even when /api/system start returns success:false
pendingImprovements.evidence: Playwright MCP network request POST /api/system returned HTTP 200 with body {success:false, action:'start', message:'Critical 프로세스 순차 서버 생성 엔진 실패로 시스템 시작 중단'}, while UI still entered /system-boot and /dashboard.
pendingImprovements.note: This is state-contract drift, not a dashboard-card regression.

pendingImprovements.title: Profile dropdown system stop does not visibly clear running/dashboard state
pendingImprovements.evidence: Profile dropdown '시스템 종료' opened the browser confirm dialog, but after accepting the menu still showed '시스템 종료' and /dashboard remained active while direct GET /api/system returned isRunning:false.
pendingImprovements.note: Landing page '시스템 종료하기' did switch the landing CTA back to '시스템 시작', so the drift is specific to unified profile/dashboard state handling.

notes: Vercel /api/version reported v8.11.161, commit ee1f14513f01953eb6c8e18549015e8abdc15aab, releaseTag v8.11.161.
Cloud Run /health reported v8.11.161 and revision ai-engine-00479-xjz with 100% traffic.
Playwright MCP had to use Chrome DevTools MCP because the Playwright MCP browser profile was locked by an existing session.
